omochat.settings.title: omochat Settings

omochat.modal.hint: Configure the geohash to subscribe to.
omochat.subordinate.label: Show subordinate geohashes
omochat.subordinate.hint: Include posts starting with configured geohash (e.g. xn77, xn0m7m for xn).
omochat.auto_relay.label: Auto-select relays based on location (Recommended)
omochat.auto_relay.hint: Automatically determines and connects to the nearest Nostr relays for the specified geohash.
omochat.auto_relay_algo.label: Auto-select Mode
omochat.merge_parent.label: Merge parent area's closest relays
omochat.merge_parent.hint: Combines and connects the closest relays of the parent area level (e.g. xn7 for xn77, x for xn).
